name: n8n
description: Monitor n8n workflow automation platform for user access, instance availability, and workflow inventory

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your n8n instance
2. Go to Settings > n8n API
3. Click 'Create an API key'
4. Choose a label and set an expiration time
5. Copy the API key
6. Enter your n8n instance URL (e.g. https://yourinstance.app.n8n.cloud) and the API key below

credentialFields.label: n8n Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your n8n instance URL (e.g. https://yourinstance.app.n8n.cloud or https://n8n.yourcompany.com). No trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Go to Settings > n8n API > Create an API key. Copy the key.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all n8n users with their roles to verify access control

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies the n8n instance is accessible and responding to API requests

checks.name: Workflow Inventory
checks.description: Lists all workflows with their active status for automation governance
